performance.name: 25th Anniversary of Christina Aguilera's self-titled debut album

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: If I Ever Fall In Love

content:
[Intro: Sabrina Carpenter]

[tab]                 [ch]Am/F#[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]

     Than I knew myself, love[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]Am/G#[/ch]

[tab]      [ch]Am/G[/ch]                        [ch]Am/F#[/ch]
If it comes back, it's yours, and that's how you know[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]Gsus4[/ch]
